Or, a guide to postwai Anglo-American political thought
The goal of this list is to give a survey of the core points of
reference for political philosophy today. As much as possible
multiple positions are represented on each topic. Books of
multiple positions are represented on each topic. Books of
special distinction are bolded. Beginners are encouraged to
start with Kymlicka (2002) and Held (2006), as they are textbook
introductions which will provide the necessary background and
context for jumping into the rest of the chart. Legal philosophy
hasn't been covered due to space.
